---
title: "Second Demonstration"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
---

## Purpose

This file is a second demonstration document.
It uses `ggformula`, `tinyplot`, and `modelsummary` with the repository data.

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggformula)
library(modelsummary)
library(tinyplot)
```

## Clean Data

```{r}
course_data <- read_csv("data/example_data.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
```

## Formula-Based Plot

```{r}
gf_point(
  exam_score ~ study_hours,
  color = ~ section,
  data = course_data
)
```

## Tiny Plot

```{r}
tinyplot(
  x = course_data$project_score,
  y = course_data$exam_score,
  color = course_data$section,
  xlab = "Project score",
  ylab = "Exam score"
)
```

## Model Summary

```{r}
score_model <- lm(exam_score ~ study_hours + project_score + section, data = course_data)

modelsummary(score_model)
```
